security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: QSL — a Rust-native desktop email client.
bundle.longDescription: QSL is an experimental desktop email client written end-to-end in Rust. Phase 0 scaffolding.
